title: Compressed Blocks
body:
Fabric mod adds crafting table recipes for compressed versions of:

* dirt
* sand
* stone
* cobblestone
* gravel
* andesite
* diorite
* granite
* deepslate
* cobbled_deepslate
* netherrack
* soul_sand

And also the crafting table recipes to reverse the compressed item back into the normal blocks.
These compressed items are items, not blocks.
